arts.ttl: Ambitious Leeds United handed Liverpool warning amid exciting £12m Elland Road claim
arts.sum: It remains unknown when Leeds United will begin work to redevelop Elland Road. No images have yet to be released of their expansion plans, but ex-Everton chief Keith Wyness believes United could bank an extra £12m in revenue per season after the work has been carried out.

arts.ttl: Don Goodman: Leeds will win Championship over Sunderland
arts.sum: Leeds’ next two games could prove pivotal in how they wish to cement their place amongst the best in the division, facing Sunderland Sheffield United, the two sides who have accumulated the most points this season (18, Blades with 2pt deduction). Leeds United face the side sitting top of the league this evening in Regis Le Bris’ Sunderland, looking to stake their claim to finish top of the division come May.

arts.ttl: Leeds United can shut up critics with perfect revenge for criminal oversight
arts.sum: Leeds had looked disjointed and exposed in the first half with neither of them protecting the defence, but (brief) preparation with Farke and the coaching staff should ensure they are better from the start tonight. Gnonto now needs to hurt defences every week.

arts.ttl: Centre-back: Archie Gray, Tottenham prediction made three months after £40m Leeds United exit
arts.sum: Leeds United lost Archie Gray for £40million at the beginning of July, and his early form at Tottenham is only adding to his stock as one of the best talents in the country. Archie Gray was the first fall guy for Leeds in the summer as they were forced into major sales, selling him to Tottenham for £40million .

arts.ttl: Luis Suarez takes aim at ex-Leeds United boss Marcelo Bielsa in scathing attack on Uruguay boss
arts.sum: “There were a lot of players who set up a meeting (with Bielsa) to ask the coach to at the very least greet us with a good morning,” Suarez said. Suarez said: “There were situations that occurred at the Copa America that hurt to see, that I didn’t talk about for the good of the group.

arts.ttl: ‘Needs some time’ – Regis Le Bris calls for patience with Sunderland man looking to replicate Jack Clarke’s success
arts.sum: Sunderland boss Regis Le Bris has called for patience with winger Romaine Mundle. Sunderland’s manager believes it will… The post ‘Needs some time’ – Regis Le Bris calls for patience with Sunderland man looking to replicate Jack Clarke’s success appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Joseph and Rothwell start, 4-2-3-1: Leeds United predicted XI to face league-leading Sunderland
arts.sum: Leeds United face table-topping Sunderland this evening looking to get back to winning ways after a frustrating draw at Norwich City on Tuesday. Leeds United predicted XI to face Sunderland

arts.ttl: Three key Leeds players facing punishment by EFL
arts.sum: Leeds United have been ticking along nicely in the Championship this season, but they face a potential situation if Willy Gnonto and two of his team-mates allow their tempers to get the better of them. The all whites currently find themselves on eighth place in the table, three points behind leaders Sunderland who they play […] The post Three key Leeds players facing punishment by EFL appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou blown away by what ex-Leeds United man Archie Gray did in Tottenham win
arts.sum: When asked why he decided to swap Gray and Ben Davies' positions in the second half, Postecoglou said: "I felt like we were starting to get on top and stronger. Archie has got a great capacity to run, and I thought putting him at left-back he would be able to get forward for us more, and Ben with his ability to defend and his left-foot meant he could get the ball out to the left side.

arts.ttl: Leeds United man confirms he’s in the squad tonight after recent injury blow
arts.sum: Injuries to Ethan Ampadu, Isaac Schmidt, Manor Solomon, Max Wöber and Dan James were already far from ideal, but Ilia Gruev’s knee issue forced him off at Carrow Road and now looks set to keep him out for “months” . However, Schmidt looks all set for at least a return to the squad tonight after previous glute problems that kept him out of the draw at Norwich City.
